raw_consumer_statement: I was scammed by an online business program called XXXX XXXX XXXX, which misrepresented its services and is operated by unqualified minors. I disputed a {$9900.00} charge related to this program with American Express twice, but both disputes were denied. The second denial cited a non-refundable clause in the agreement. I believe this contract is not valid due to the deceptive nature of the business. I also believe that key evidence I submitted including proof of misrepresentation and partial refund offers may have been overlooked by Amex during their review.
